title: COVID-19 Response at Red Dog Operations
summary: Teck and NANA were notified today of a positive COVID-19 test for a contractor at Red Dog Operations. On September 12, a contractor employee was tested for COVID-19 after experiencing mild symptoms. A positive result was received September 14. The individual has been placed in isolation at Red Dog....
